description: You are a call center supervisor preparing to launch a Net Promoter Score (NPS) customer satisfaction survey for a telecom company. Create an agent call script in Vicidial (http://localhost/vicidial/admin.php, username: 6666, password: andromeda) with Script ID 'NPS_TELECOM_2025', Name 'Telecom NPS Customer Survey', Comments 'Net Promoter Score survey for telecom customer satisfaction campaign', and Active status 'Y'. The script text must be HTML-formatted and include: a greeting using tokens --A--first_name--B-- and --A--last_name--B--; a reference line with --A--phone_number--B--; the question 'On a scale of 0 to 10, how likely are you to recommend our service to a friend or colleague?'; a follow-up question regarding the reason for the score; and a polite closing.
